title: GitHub RAG Ingestion Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration for secrets backend and cache management

secrets_backend.title: Secrets Backend
secrets_backend.description: Where to store repository authentication secrets

vault_mount_path.title: Vault Mount Path
vault_mount_path.description: Mount path for secrets in Vault

vault_secret_path.title: Vault Secret Path
vault_secret_path.description: Base path for plugin secrets in Vault

cache_path.title: Git Cache Path
cache_path.description: Directory for storing cloned repositories (uses temp dir if not specified)

cache_max_age_hours.title: Cache Max Age (hours)
cache_max_age_hours.description: Maximum age of cached repositories before cleanup
